headline: Textile Conservator · Latin American weavings, Ottoman embroideries, American samplers
location: Jamaica Plain, Boston, MA, United States
summary: Independent textile conservator running Perez Textile Conservation in Jamaica Plain, Boston. Specialist in Latin American textiles (Pre-Columbian and Oaxacan weavings, Mexican embroideries), Ottoman embroideries, and American colonial-era samplers and coverlets. M.A. Art Conservation (textile specialization), Winterthur / University of Delaware Program, 2012. Post-grad fellowship at the Textile Museum, Washington D.C., 2012–2014. Member, American Institute for Conservation. Working in English and Spanish.
